series_metadata.series_title: Bidding Documents, RPF''s, RFQ''s or similar documents (purchasing, construction, personal service)

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years then destroy. For services, retain 16 years then destroy. ; Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years then destroy. For services, retain 16 years then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
